Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

"Harivamsa" in digital format?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-11-14 · 6 answers
Hare Krsna.

Does anybody know where I can find it?
Thank you.
user [2] · 2007-11-14
http://www.mahabharata-resources.org/harivamsa
will that do?
user [38] · 2007-11-14
I have the full Dutt version but only a very poor quality scan of 1,9 Mb size. If anyone is interested, I could upload it somewhere.
user [1] · 2007-11-14
please VEDA send the file to pariprashnena at gmail and we will upload and post the link.
user [174] · 2007-11-14
Dear mishra, VEDA & admin,
thank you very much!
user [1] · 2007-11-14
O.K. Done.
Download link for Harivamsha:
http://www.archive.org/download/Harivamsha/Harivamsa.doc
user [283] · 2008-04-24
This link provides an incomplete Harivamsha stopping half way through the Bhavishya Parva. Where is the rest please? And it is replete with ascii characters. Isnt there a readable version anywhere?
